content: Task task-033 completed: Configured Expo multi-platform build support for WorkTracker. Updated app.json with explicit Google Sign-In URL scheme metadata and OAuth intent filters covering both worktracker://auth/callback and https://worktracker.app/auth/callback. Added app.config.js to inject SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, GOOGLE_IOS_REVERSED_CLIENT_ID, and EAS_PROJECT_ID into Expo config at build time without hardcoding secrets. Created eas.json with development, preview, and production build profiles bound to same-named EAS environments. Added docs/MOBILE_BUILD.md covering EAS setup, required environment variables, build profiles, and platform build commands. Verification: npm run typecheck passed; npx expo config --type public resolved correctly with sample env values; npm run build:web passed with sample env values. No new endpoints or external inputs were added, so input validation/auth/authz/error-path test items were not applicable to this task. Git commit created: [task-033] Configure Expo multi-platform build (b634d77). git pull --rebase was attempted before commit but failed because the shared worktree contained unrelated unstaged changes.

Received earlier wind_down signal. Finished task-033, committed it as b634d77 ([task-033] Configure Expo multi-platform build), marked it complete, and am pausing now without claiming additional tasks.
